summary: Games Tab | Hearing Announcement When Focusing on an MLB Network
description:
GIVEN the user is in the Games tab
AND TTS is enabled
AND the game is being streamed on MLN Network (MLBN)

steps.action: WHEN the user focuses on MLN Network game tile
steps.result: THEN the user will hear: "MLBN, <Half of the inning + Inning>,  <Away team Name + Away team>, <Home Team Name + Home team score>, X of X items”
